theme_and_archetype.description: Objective, rigid, functional, and authoritative. Designed for clarity and efficiency in logistics. Emphasizes stark contrast, minimalistic structural lines, and functional color usage over decoration.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Labels and overlines must be uppercase and widely tracked.
Never center text by default; use strict left-alignment for dense content and forms.
Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome.
Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) strictly for primary CTAs and active states.
Use Warning Yellow (#FFD700) and Signal Red (#FF2400) for logistics alerts and status changes.
Hover states must be explicitly defined and accessible.

grid_systems.front_office: Bento Grid (Asymmetric, gap-6 to gap-8). Use col-span-full for hero/summary elements.
grid_systems.back_office: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4). Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout. Items use border-r border-b border-border/40. Max border-radius: 4px (rounded-sm) for a sharp, technical look.
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

components.general: Heavily customize Shadcn/UI. Strip 'Vercel-look'. Make elements flat with crisp 1px borders.
components.buttons: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Distinct hover states.
components.cards: Avoid soft shadows. Use 'Grid Borders' or pure 1px solid borders (border-black/10).
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select. Labels left-aligned. Input fields flat with border-b only or sharp box.
components.timeline_tracker: For desktop: Horizontal Linear Progress Step Pattern. For Mobile/Scanner: Minimalist Vertical Timeline. Active steps highlighted in Blue, exceptions in Red.
components.tables: Dense rows, stark contrast headers, clear alternating row subtle backgrounds or solid grid lines.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboards and logistics operations. Provide 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' command.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color shift or subtle lift (-translate-y-[1px]) with shadow-sm.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use minimalist skeleton loaders or technical ASCII/monospaced loading text instead of generic spinners.

image_urls.description: Stacked cargo containers on a massive ship at the harbor. Use for login screen or front office hero section overlay (with bg-black/40).
Delivery worker inside van. Use for Mobile Scanner app onboarding or auth background.
Abstract colorful 3D shape on light background. Use as placeholder for the agency logo in headers.

rules: Max overlay opacity for images is bg-black/50.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large. Check with APCA.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based). e.g., data-testid='submit-shipment-button'
accessibility_and_testing.multilingual: Ensure UI supports RTL (Right-to-Left) layout shifts for Arabic (AR) mode gracefully. Text alignments and grid flows should reverse.

specific_screens_instructions.front_office: Client portal. Focus on the 'Bento Grid'. Needs a prominent 'Create Shipment' CTA, a clean table of past shipments, and a highly visual 'Tracking Timeline'. Display estimated costs prominently in both EUR and MAD.
specific_screens_instructions.back_office: Agent view. Data-heavy 'Control Room' grid. Requires complex tables with filters, validation toggles, and status alerts. Focus on density and readability. Monochrome base with status colors.
specific_screens_instructions.mobile_scanner: Driver app. Full-screen optimized for mobile. Massive action buttons for 'Scan QR', 'Update Status'. Minimalist vertical timeline. High contrast for outdoor visibility.
